OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS & AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT ELITE CONCORD GROUP LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA CONCORD HOLIDAY INN AKASH, KEVIN

DISCOVERY, 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY FILED (CCP SEC.2031.310(A)). DEFENDANTS DID FILE RESPONSES TO THE INITIAL DOCUMENT REQUEST WHICH, WHILE LARGELY CONSISTING OF OBJECTIONS, DID INCLUDE A WILLINGNESS TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO REVIEW AND COPY DOCUMENTS IN BANKERS BOXES. THE SUBSEQUENT CORRESPONDENCE CONTAINS NO REQUEST BY PLAINTIFF FOR AN EXTENSION OF TIME IN WHICH TO FILE A MOTION TO COMPEL IF IT DEEMED THE INITIAL RESPONSE TO BE INADEQUATE. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED AS IT APPEARS FROM THE CORRESPONDENCE THAT BOTH PARTIES WERE NOT AS COOPERATIVE AS ONE WOULD HAVE EXPECTED. FOR EXAMPLE THERE ARE NUMEROUS REQUESTS BY PLAINTIFF COMMENCING ON MAY 22, 2012 FOR DATES WHEN INSPECTION COULD BE MADE, ALL OF WHICH WERE UNANSWERED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (610)

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACHED ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT FOR DEFENDANT (ELITE CONCORD GROUP LLC AND KEVIN AKASH) IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON THE DEFENDANTS AGAINST WHOM IT SEEKS AN ATTACHMENT AS REQUIRED BY CCP 484.040(A) AND THAT DEFENDANTS DENY THAT IT WAS SERVED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S Motion To Compel Responses To PlAINtIFfs Request For Production Of Documents, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY FILED (CCP SEC.2031.310(a)). DEFENDANTS DID FILE RESPONSES TO THE INITIAL DOCUMENT REQUEST WHICH, WHILE LARGELY CONSISTING OF OBJECTIONS, DID INCLUDE A WILLINGNESS TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO REVIEW AND COPY DOCUMENTS IN BANKERS BOXES. THE SUBSEQUENT CORRESPONDENCE CONTAINS NO REQUEST BY PLAINTIFF FOR AN EXTENSION OF TIME IN WHICH TO FILE A MOTION TO COMPEL IF IT DEEMED THE INITIAL RESPONSE TO BE INADEQUATE. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED AS IT APPEARS FROM THE CORRESPONDENCE THAT BOTH PARTIES WERE NOT AS COOPERATIVE AS ONE WOULD HAVE EXPECTED. FOR EXAMPLE THERE ARE NUMEROUS REQUESTS BY PLAINTIFF COMMENCING ON MAY 22, 2012 FOR DATES WHEN INSPECTION COULD BE MADE, ALL OF WHICH WERE UNANSWERED. Court to prepare order. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attached Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KARL PETREY, TEL. NO. (949) 929-9627 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attached Order And Writ Of Attachment for Defendant (Elite Concord Group LLC and Kevin Akash) is Denied. Plaintiff did not file a proof of service of the summons and complaint on the defendants against whom it seeks an attachment as required by CCP 484.040(a) and that defendants deny that it was served. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
